hero.name: Vithushan
hero.subtitle: Associate Technical Lead
hero.description: Software Engineer specializing in building performant, scalable and secure web & mobile applications.

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a Software Engineer with rich experience delivering complex, cross-platform mobile applications and large-scale web platforms. I bring strong expertise in JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python, alongside proficiency in React, Next.js, React Native, and Node.js, building performant, scalable, and secure applications.

I make impactful contributions across the Software Development Life Cycle, from analysis and design to testing and deployment. As an engaged Agile collaborator, I thrive in fast-paced environments, mentoring junior engineers, and aligning stakeholders to drive progress.
about.skillHeading: Here are the few technologies I have been working with recently:

bullets: Drafted and documented front-end architectural designs and presented them to the Technical Design Authority and Technical Design Board, including Principal Software Engineers, Tech Leads, Software Architects, and Team Managers, to provide technical solutions that addressed technical requirements.

Cultivated a collaborative environment within the team by mentoring Junior Engineers through active code reviews and pair programming, facilitating knowledge-sharing and improving the quality of output.

Developed a styled shared component library as an npm package following Atomic Design methodology and SOLID principles, and utilized Storybook to document and visualize components, increasing team efficiency by boosting reusability and reducing code redundancy.

Instituted standard coding practices that significantly boosted code readability, ensured its maintainability, and boosted team efficiency by leveraging industry-established guidelines and collaboration tools in the process.
Collaborated within a cross-functional team employing Agile practices, including daily stand-up meetings and weekly sprints, to effectively deliver software under tight deadlines.

Optimized the web application's load time by applying lazy loading, browser caching, virtualizing large lists, rendering strategies, code splitting, memoization, and leveraging Vite, Web Workers, and React Query, achieving a page load time of under 10 ms.

Initiated a thorough revamp of the Explori Web Application, using React for the front-end, integrating state management with MobX, employing Scss for advanced styling solutions while developing forms, tables, data filtration mechanisms, and custom charts with Apache ECharts, all contributing to an improved user experience.

Implemented the Strategy Pattern with React Hook Form to increase validation flexibility, reduce code duplication, and enhance code reusability and scalability in a React application, streamlining dynamic styling through the modular stylesheets.

Crafted and implemented a secure user authentication system using the Microsoft Identity Platform, employing OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow and JWT for effective token-based authentication to safeguard user data privacy.
Evaluated solutions by deploying unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests using frameworks such as Jest, Vitest, React Testing Library, and Cypress, achieving a code coverage of 80%.
Deployed using Docker and Git hooks, and gained familiarity with Jenkins, achieving a more efficient deployment process.

Maintained and enhanced the software by implementing periodic updates and optimizations, utilizing Git for source code management and Prometheus for real-time performance monitoring, ensuring continuous system efficiency.

Led a mobile development team of 5 to create cross-platform applications, completing successful Proof of Concepts and played a pivotal role in the technical effort by leading development teams and enhancing application performance across web and mobile platforms, by improving user experience, and optimizing application efficiencies.

Collaborated with UI/UX teams and cross-functional teams, employing Microsoft Fluent Design System, to design and develop web applications and e-commerce products for the Netherlands Government, enhancing user engagement and functionality.

Refined and sustained the job portal web application by integrating React with advanced practices such as custom hooks, lazy loading images, and memoizing components; combined with Server-Side Rendering using Next.js and employing component composition, modularization, and code smells removal, which led to reducing the load time from 12 seconds to 3 seconds.

Transitioned 2,000 active users to the “365 Meditaties” mobile app, developed using React Native, and optimized user engagement by adhering to Material Design and Human Interface Guidelines, while implementing responsive design, intuitive navigation, accessibility, and TypeScript to ensure type safety and modular coding, thereby achieving cross-platform compatibility on Android and iOS.

Developed cutting-edge features such as notifications, chat, concurrent meditation, and in-app subscriptions using MobX-State-Tree and Emotion with Moti, improving immutable data structures, change detection, debugging, module reloading, and refining tweening algorithms and hardware acceleration to ensure a fluid user experience.

Implemented Sentry and Firebase to optimize app performance and monitor user engagement analytics by integrating error tracking, performance monitoring, real-time database, and user authentication, while RevenueCat managed subscription lifecycle and payment processing, boosting user retention rates.

Developed an Excel sheet reader to streamline the bot maintenance team's manual work for the Virtual Concierge project and participated in Scrum and Agile ceremonies, enhancing team productivity, ensuring timely project delivery, and improving overall management.

Built the Virtual Concierge Dashboard application using Java and SpringBoot, integrating dependency injection and microservices architecture alongside Python and MongoDB, streamlining data processing and user experience with indexing and replication.

Conducted a document reader that searches both text and textual images within PDF files using the Ingest Attachment Plugin of Elasticsearch, integrating full-text search capabilities and data indexing to improve the system's information retrieval efficiency by reducing processing time.
Resolved critical issues in the application during the User Acceptance Testing period by managing JIRA tickets and providing on-call support, which improved system stability by reducing downtime.

education.heading: Education
education.school: Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT)
education.degree: Bachelor of Science (Hons) in Information Technology
education.description: Developed and integrated a plant disease detection system using Deep Learning, training ResNet50 and Inception-v3 models and converting them into TensorFlow Lite for use in a Flutter mobile app, leading a 4-member team.
